name: Exploration Table
source: Five Parsecs from Home Core Rules p.80
description: D100 Exploration Table. Roll once per crew member Exploring.

results.name: I know a good deal
results.effect: Roll on the Trade Table instead.

results.name: Meet a Patron
results.effect: You are offered a Patron job. You may accept or decline.

results.name: Bad food
results.effect: Spend 1 campaign turn in Sick Bay. Soulless and K'Erin ignore this result.

results.name: Meet someone interesting
results.effect: Gain a Quest Rumor. If you are a Precursor, roll 1D6: on a 5+, gain a second Rumor.

results.name: Had a nice chat
results.effect: Roll 1D6+Savvy. On a 5+, earn +1 story point.

results.name: See the sights
results.effect: No effect.

results.name: Make a new friend
results.effect: Add a new crew member to the group.

results.name: Time to relax
results.effect: No effect.

results.name: Possible bargain
results.effect: You may trade any one weapon. Roll 1D6: On a 6, receive a roll on the Loot Table. On any other result, receive 1 credit.
results.roll_info: Trade weapon, 1D6: on 6 Loot Table, else 1 credit

results.name: Alien merchant
results.effect: You may give the merchant any one item. In exchange, roll on the Loot Table.

results.name: Got yourself noticed
results.effect: You must fight a random Rival this campaign turn.

results.name: You hear a tip
results.effect: You may track down a Rival and fight them this campaign turn.

results.name: Completely lost
results.effect: Roll 1D6+Savvy. On a 4+, you find your way back. Otherwise, miss the battle this turn. Re-roll if you have no battles.

results.name: Package delivered
results.effect: Earn 3 credits upon arriving on a new world. Roll 1D6: On a 1-2, also gain a Rival and +1 story point.
results.roll_info: 3 credits on new world; 1D6: 1-2 also +Rival +1 SP

results.name: Tech fanatic
results.effect: A random item you carry is damaged. Roll 1D6: On a 5-6, it is repaired for free. If the crew member is an Engineer, earn +2 XP instead.
results.roll_info: Random item damaged; 1D6: 5-6 free repair; Engineer: +2 XP

results.name: Got a few drinks
results.effect: No effect.

results.name: Gambling problem
results.effect: You must discard 1 item carried by the crew member. Soulless ignore this result.

results.name: Overheard some talk
results.effect: Gain a Quest Rumor.

results.name: Pick a fight
results.effect: Gain a Rival. If the crew member is K'Erin, the first battle against this Rival has 1 fewer enemy.
results.kerin_bonus: First battle vs this Rival: -1 enemy

results.name: Found a trainer
results.effect: The crew member earns +2 XP.

results.name: Information broker
results.effect: You may buy up to 3 Quest Rumors at 2 credits each.

results.name: Arms dealer
results.effect: You may make up to 3 rolls on the Military Weapons Table at 3 credits each.

results.name: Promising lead
results.effect: Earn +3 credits if you fight an Opportunity mission this campaign turn.

results.name: Just needs a little love
results.effect: Roll on the Gadget Table. The item is damaged. If the crew member is an Engineer, the item works immediately.

results.name: Get in a bad fight
results.effect: Spend 1D3 campaign turns in Sick Bay and lose 1 item carried.

results.name: Offered a small job
results.effect: If you kill a random enemy during a battle this turn, earn 2 credits.

results.name: Offered a reward
results.effect: If you reach a specific terrain feature during a battle this turn, earn 2 credits.

results.name: You make a useful contact
results.effect: Add +1 to any Recruit, Find Patron, or Track roll next campaign turn.

results.name: Who left this lying around?
results.effect: Receive your choice of a Handgun, Blade, Colony Rifle, or Shotgun.
items: Handgun OR Blade OR Colony Rifle OR Shotgun

results.name: This place is rather nice, really
results.effect: Pay 1 story point or the crew member decides to stay behind and leaves the crew.
